case_title: JEAN NEOL BECHET VS. FARAJI HAMID GHAYOUR

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BECHET, JEAN NEOL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GHAYOUR, FARAJI HAMID $3,353.02 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,403.02 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-23-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JEAN NEOL BECHET IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FARAJI HAMID GHAYOUR IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,353.02 FILED BY BECHET, JEAN NEOL AS TO DEFENDANT GHAYOUR, FARAJI HAMID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2019 - JUDGMENT.
